artDirection.style: Dark fantasy metroidvania, ethereal glowing silhouettes
artDirection.signature: Dimensional rift glow — cyan/purple energy cracks that permeate all entities and environments

player.desc: Echo the Rift Walker — cyan hooded cloak, white porcelain mask with glowing cyan eye slits, purple energy rift blade, dimensional particle aura

enemy.desc: Shadow Rift entity — dark purple armored form with red menacing eyes, crown spikes, magenta rift cracks, shadow tendrils, floating debris fragments

bgLayer1.desc: Deep space sky with 85+ stars, purple/cyan nebulae, constellation lines, dimensional rift tear, distant mountains with ruins, floating islands, fog layers, shooting stars

bgLayer2.desc: Mid-ground ruined landscape — two stone arches with rune engravings, crystal clusters, dimensional portal, dead trees, fallen pillars/debris, firefly particles, ground fog

uiHeart.desc: Dimensional heart — 3D gradient heart with crystal facets, rift crack lines, purple energy glow, dimensional sparkle accents

uiStar.desc: Rift star gem — cyan-to-teal gradient star with purple rift gem center, energy lines radiating from center, sparkle accents, rune symbols

powerup.desc: Rift power crystal — hexagonal frame with orbiting gems, central magenta crystal with facets, up-arrow power symbol, energy wave arcs, rune decorations

effectHit.desc: Dimensional shockwave — 5-layer radial burst (white core → magenta → purple → cyan ring → outer fade), 8 directional burst lines, dimensional crack lines, flying debris shards, sparkle points

thumbnail.desc: Cinematic poster — Echo facing a massive dimensional rift with shadow enemies emerging, ruined pillars, crystal clusters, stars and nebulae, SHADOW RIFT title in gradient cyan-to-magenta
